channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: South African activists return home after detention in Israel following Gaza flotilla mission
item.description: Six South African delegates involved in the Global Sumud Flotilla have returned home after what they described as a traumatic detention in an Israeli prison following their interception in internation...

item.title: FIA orders extra formation laps after false start at Canadian Grand Prix amid cold conditions
item.description: The Canadian Formula 1 race experienced an unusual disruption after officials were forced to call two additional formation laps following a false start involving driver Kimi Antonelli. The incident un...

item.title: AIIMS team conducts additional testing in Twisha Sharma death case; second autopsy report expected after detailed analysis
item.description: The case of Twisha Sharma’s death has prompted further forensic examination, with a senior AIIMS Delhi team indicating that the second post-mortem report will take additional time due to the need for ...

item.title: Repatriated Overseas Filipino Workers Join DMW Labor Day Fair to Find New Jobs Abroad
item.description: Several repatriated overseas Filipino workers (OFWs) attended the Labor Day job fair organised by the Department of Migrant Workers (DMW) to look for new employment opportunities abroad. The activity ...

item.title: Exploring the Use of Antihistamines for Managing PMDD and Perimenopause Symptoms
item.description: Recent reports highlight a growing trend where women are using over-the-counter antihistamines, such as Allegra (an H1 blocker) and Pepcid AC (an H2 blocker containing famotidine), to alleviate sympto...

item.title: Martine Carol and Her Legacy in 1950s French Cinema
item.description: Martine Carol was one of the most prominent stars of post-war French cinema, widely celebrated during the 1950s as a symbol of elegance, beauty, and glamour. Often referred to as the “Golden Girl” of ...

item.title: Rubio accuses Hezbollah of destabilizing Lebanon amid ongoing regional tensions and ceasefire fragility
item.description: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio has accused Hezbollah of attempting to plunge Lebanon back into instability, warning that the Iran-backed group is undermining the country’s democratic institutions...

item.title: CBN Governor Cardoso Commits to Orthodox Monetary Policies for Stronger Economic Confidence
item.description: Olayemi Cardoso, the Governor of the Central Bank of Nigeria, don talk say the bank no go go back to those unorthodox interventionist policies wey dem dey use before. According to am, the current refo...

item.title: EasyJet flight to London diverted to Rome after passenger reported charging power bank in aircraft hold
item.description: An EasyJet flight travelling from Hurghada, Egypt, to London Luton was diverted to Rome after a passenger informed cabin crew that a power bank was charging inside luggage stored in the aircraft hold....

item.title: How to watch the 2026 Canadian Grand Prix live and current Formula 1 standings
item.description: The article provides viewing information and a competitive overview ahead of the 2026 Canadian Grand Prix in Montreal at Circuit Gilles Villeneuve. The race weekend marks the third sprint event of the...

item.title: Canberra residents debate water pricing policy and wider political issues in letters section
item.description: This letters-to-the-editor collection from The Canberra Times covers a range of community views on current political, environmental, and social issues. The lead letter criticises Icon Water’s pricing ...

item.title: Six Bengaluru police personnel suspended after explosives found near PM convoy route
item.description: Six police personnel, including a sub-inspector, an assistant sub-inspector, and four constables, were suspended in Bengaluru following alleged negligence during Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s visit t...

item.title: Mexico Resists U.S. Pressure to Extradite Politicians Accused of Cartel Connections
item.description: Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum is facing increasing pressure from U.S. President Donald Trump over security co-operation, cartel violence, and extradition demands, while also trying to protect Me...

item.title: Ebola outbreak in Central Africa escalates amid clinic attacks and rising cross-border cases
item.description: The Ebola outbreak in Central Africa has intensified, with new reports of violence disrupting containment efforts and a continued rise in cases across the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) and Uganda...

item.title: DRC restricts travel to Bunia as Ebola outbreak expands and strains health response capacity
item.description: Authorities in the Democratic Republic of Congo have imposed new travel restrictions, including suspending commercial, private, and special flights to the eastern city of Bunia, as an Ebola outbreak c...

item.title: Trump weighs Iran policy decision amid internal and external pressure over peace talks
item.description: According to reporting and commentary cited in the article, U.S. President Donald Trump is facing growing political pressure as his administration approaches a potential decision on whether to continu...

item.title: Navigating intimacy and solitude while living with breast cancer
item.description: In this first-person essay, the author reflects on how a breast cancer diagnosis has intensified a lifelong tension between intimacy and solitude. Following her diagnosis in January, confirmed by biop...

item.title: Vice Ganda Energizes Virtual Assistants Through Zumba Segment on Everybody Sing
item.description: Naghatid ng good vibes at entertainment si Vice Ganda sa isang espesyal na episode ng “Everybody Sing” kung saan tampok ang grupo ng mga virtual assistants na tinawag na “Songbayanang Virtual Assistan...

item.title: Overview of The Beatles’ 1963 Christmas Variety Show in London
item.description: The Beatles’ Christmas Show of 1963 was a major variety stage production organized by their manager Brian Epstein during the band’s breakthrough year in the United Kingdom. The event took place at the...

item.title: Over 1,500 candidates appear for UPSC Civil Services Preliminary Examination in Puducherry
item.description: The Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) Civil Services Preliminary Examination witnessed a turnout of 69.05% in Puducherry on Sunday. As per official estimates, around 1,546 candidates appeared for...
